title: Michael Burry says the market today feels like 'the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble'
summary_full: "Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment," Burry wrote. "Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble."
summary_public: "Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment," Burry wrote. "Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble."
